name: hcportal_getUsageData
description: Returns comprehensive platform usage statistics for the HC admin portal dashboard. Returns 5 rowsets: app version distribution (iOS vs Android), integration job status, usage metrics across data types (Account, Activity, Event, Kennel, Login, Payment, Portal, Error), recent login details, and recently updated/active events.

parameters.name: deviceId
parameters.description: Auth: device ID used to look up the authenticated user and device secret. Validated via HC6.ValidatePortalAuth.

parameters.name: accessToken
parameters.description: Auth: short-lived cryptographic token validated via HC6.ValidatePortalAuth.

rowsets.name: ErrorEnvelope
rowsets.description: Returned on any validation, auth, or runtime error. Short-circuits on first error.

columns.name: Success
columns.description: Always 0 on error

columns.name: ErrorMessage
columns.description: Human-readable error message

rowsets.name: VersionData
rowsets.description: App version distribution showing iOS vs Android usage. Aggregates latest login records from the last 14 days where HcVersion LIKE 'HC Ver:%' and LEN(SystemName) > 2.

columns.name: versionNum
columns.description: App version number extracted from HcVersion (portion before the '--' delimiter)

columns.name: buildNum
columns.description: Build number extracted from HcVersion (portion after the '--' delimiter)

columns.name: isiPhone
columns.description: Count of users on this version whose SystemName is 'iOS'

columns.name: isNotiPhone
columns.description: Count of users on this version whose SystemName is not 'iOS'

rowsets.name: IntegrationJobData
rowsets.description: Latest integration job run statistics for the most recent 10 integrations (by IntegrationAbbreviation order). Only jobs with a non-null endedAt are included.

columns.name: integrationAbbreviation
columns.description: Short name for the integration from HC.Integration

columns.name: integrationEnabled
columns.description: Whether this integration is currently enabled (0=disabled, non-zero=enabled) from HC.Integration.Enabled

columns.name: interval
columns.description: Scheduled interval in minutes between integration runs from HC.Integration.Interval

columns.name: integrationId
columns.description: Unique identifier for the integration from HC.IntegrationJob.IntegrationId

columns.name: recordsRead
columns.description: Number of records read in the last job from HC.IntegrationJob.RecordsRead

columns.name: recordsWritten
columns.description: Number of records successfully written in the last job from HC.IntegrationJob.RecordsWritten

columns.name: recordsFailedInfo
columns.description: Details about failed record imports from HC.IntegrationJob.RecordsFailedInfo

columns.name: errorCount
columns.description: Number of errors encountered in the last job from HC.IntegrationJob.ErrorCount

columns.name: errorInfo
columns.description: Details about errors from HC.IntegrationJob.ErrorInfo

columns.name: endedAt
columns.description: Timestamp when the last job completed from HC.IntegrationJob.endedAt

columns.name: minutesAgo
columns.description: Minutes elapsed since the last job completed (DATEDIFF(MINUTE, endedAt, GETDATE()))

columns.name: kennelsSucceeded
columns.description: Number of kennels successfully synced from HC.IntegrationJob.KennelsSucceeded

columns.name: kennelsSucceededInfo
columns.description: Details about successfully synced kennels from HC.IntegrationJob.KennelsSucceededInfo

columns.name: kennelsFailed
columns.description: Number of kennels that failed to sync from HC.IntegrationJob.KennelsFailed

columns.name: kennelsFailedInfo
columns.description: Details about kennels that failed to sync from HC.IntegrationJob.KennelsFailedInfo

columns.name: futureRunCount
columns.description: Total count of future events (EventStartDatetimeIndexed > GETDATE()). Same value repeated for all rows.

rowsets.name: UsageStatistics
rowsets.description: Usage metrics for 8 data types (Account, Activity, Event, Kennel, Login, Payment, Portal, Error) across multiple time windows. Rows ordered by id (0-7). Counts SUM CASE expressions so all count columns can be 0 but are not NULL in practice.

columns.name: dataType
columns.description: Type of data: 'Account', 'Activity', 'Event', 'Kennel', 'Login', 'Payment', 'Portal', or 'Error'

columns.name: id
columns.description: Sort order identifier (0=Account, 1=Activity, 2=Event, 3=Kennel, 4=Login, 5=Payment, 6=Portal, 7=Error)

columns.name: lastHour
columns.description: Count of records created/updated in the last hour

columns.name: lastHourComp
columns.description: Count from the hour before last (comparison baseline)

columns.name: lastDay
columns.description: Count of records created/updated in the last 24 hours

columns.name: lastDayComp
columns.description: Count from the 24 hours before that (comparison baseline)

columns.name: lastWeek
columns.description: Count of records created/updated in the last 7 days

columns.name: lastWeekComp
columns.description: Count from the 7 days before that (comparison baseline)

columns.name: lastMonth
columns.description: Count of records created/updated in the last 30 days

columns.name: lastMonthComp
columns.description: Count from the 30 days before that (comparison baseline)

rowsets.name: LoginInformation
rowsets.description: Login detail for users who logged in in the last 24 hours (HcVersion LIKE 'HC Ver%'). Grouped by user, device type, OS version, HC version, and home kennel. Ordered by most recent login descending.

columns.name: userName
columns.description: Display name from HC.Hasher.DisplayName (computed column)

columns.name: userId
columns.description: User's unique identifier from HC.LaunchAndLogin.UserId

columns.name: realName
columns.description: User's first and last name concatenated with a space (h.FirstName + ' ' + h.LastName)

columns.name: photo
columns.description: User's photo URL from HC.Hasher.Photo

columns.name: isIphone
columns.description: Device type flag: 1=iPhone (DeviceType='iPhone'), 0=non-iPhone, -1=NULL DeviceType

columns.name: systemVersion
columns.description: OS version (first 5 chars of SystemVersion with '/' removed). COALESCE to empty string if NULL.

columns.name: loginCount
columns.description: Number of logins in the last 24 hours for this user/device/version group

columns.name: lastLoginDate
columns.description: Most recent login timestamp for this group (MAX of LoginDate)

columns.name: minutesSinceLastLogin
columns.description: Minutes elapsed since last login (DATEDIFF(MINUTE, MAX(LoginDate), GETDATE()))

columns.name: kennelName
columns.description: User's home kennel name. COALESCE to empty string if NULL.

columns.name: kennelShortName
columns.description: User's home kennel short name. COALESCE to empty string if NULL.

columns.name: hcVersion
columns.description: HC app version (LEFT of HcVersion up to the first comma)

columns.name: highlightPhoneVersion
columns.description: Computed highlight priority for phone OS version: 0=current, 1=recent, 2=older, 3=outdated. Based on systemVersion LIKE patterns.

columns.name: highlightHcVersion
columns.description: Computed highlight priority for HC version: 0=current (2.1+, 2.0+), 1=recent (1.6+), 2=older (1.5+), 3=outdated (1.2, 1.1.x, all others)

rowsets.name: RecentEvents
rowsets.description: UNION DISTINCT of the top 20 most recently updated events and top 20 most active events (by HasherEventMap activity in last 24 hours). Only includes events within 48 hours of start that are visible (IsVisible=1). Ordered by minutesAgoUpdated ASC.

columns.name: kennelName
columns.description: Kennel name hosting the event

columns.name: kennelShortName
columns.description: Kennel short name

columns.name: kennelLogo
columns.description: Kennel logo URL

columns.name: eventName
columns.description: Event name (FbEventName if UseFbRunDetails != 0, otherwise EventName)

columns.name: minutesAgoUpdated
columns.description: Minutes elapsed since event was last updated (DATEDIFF(MINUTE, evt.updatedAt, GETDATE()))

columns.name: minutesAgoCreated
columns.description: Minutes elapsed since event was created (DATEDIFF(MINUTE, evt.createdAt, GETDATE()))

columns.name: minutesUntilRun
columns.description: Minutes until the event starts (DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), EventStartDatetime)). Negative if already started.

columns.name: activityLastDay
columns.description: Count of HasherEventMap records updated in the last 24 hours for this event

columns.name: publicEventId
columns.description: Public identifier for the event from HC.Event.PublicEventId

breakingChangeRules: Never remove a column from any rowset
Never change a sentinel value meaning (e.g. isIphone -1 = NULL DeviceType)
Never change the dataType string values in UsageStatistics rowset
Never change the id sort order values (0-7) in UsageStatistics rowset
Never change the highlight priority values (0-3) in LoginInformation rowset without updating portal UI
Never change the hardcoded excluded user GUIDs without coordinating with callers
